---
title: ""
---

# Fuminari Miura

Senior Researcher  
Infectious disease modelling, theoretical epidemiology

Email: (your email) · GitHub: (link) · Google Scholar: (link)

## Research focus
- Epidemic theory for practical control
- Network-structured transmission
- Reduced-order models for decision support

## Selected work
- (2026) Dynamic shift in the dominant transmission route of clade Ib mpox virus… *Science Advances* (in press)
